title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Marathon Realty - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Marathon Realty - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Marathon Realty in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Marathon Realty:
Marathon Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marathon Realty!
